testcase.name: Browser smoke ride lifecycle completes one ride across customer, driver, and admin via UI only
testcase.classname: completes one ride across customer, driver, and admin via UI only

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 30000ms: Expected to find content: 'Tiếp tục đặt xe' within the selector: 'button' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 30000ms: Expected to find content: 'Tiếp tục đặt xe' within the selector: 'button' but never did. at nativeClickButtonByText (webpack://cab-booking-customer-app/./cypress/e2e/ride-lifecycle.cy.ts:37:51) at Context.eval (webpack://cab-booking-customer-app/./cypress/e2e/ride-lifecycle.cy.ts:108:4)
